Test Steps

Given The user is on the OrangeHRM login page
When The user views the login page
Then The page must have a white background on the left
And a red curve on the right
And The circular badge with "HR for All"
And the OrangeHRM logo must be visible on the right side
And The OrangeHRM logo
And text "OrangeHRM OPEN SOURCE HR MANAGEMENT" must be centered at the top of the login container

Test Steps




Given The user is on the OrangeHRM login page


When The user views the login page


Then The login button must be present


And The login button must be full-width


And The login button must be solid red with white text reading "Login"






Test Results




Given The user is on the OrangeHRM login page
Screenshot


When The user views the login page
Screenshot


Then The login button must be present
Screenshot


And The login button must be full-width
Expected content not visible on page (vision)
Screenshot


And The login button must be solid red with white text reading "Login"






Post-Run Summary


The test failed at step 3 due to the login button not matching the expected full-width style (`width: 100%`). The error message indicates a visual mismatch, likely because the button’s actual width is less than 100%. A practical next step is to inspect the button’s computed styles in the browser dev tools and adjust the test assertion or fix the CSS to ensure full-width styling.
